metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4529
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Colocalisation of Arf6 with Homer puncta in double-immunolabeling of primary hippocampal neurons is indicative of postsynaptic localization.

17/02/2021 Dnyanada: Figure S3 shows that the anti-Arf6 antibody (AVIVA SYSTEM BIOLOGY, ARP54598-P050, 1:100) used in the study did not produce a signal in arf6-knockdown condition, and the effect was rescued indicating that the antibody might be specific for Arf6.
Arf6 also colocalises with presynaptic markers: VGlut1 and synaptophysin and a separate annotation has been made for the term "presynapse" (SynGO ID:4129). Experimental description: M&M

Hippocampal primary culture

Pregnant rats were killed by inhalation of CO2, and 18-day-old embryos were immediately removed by Cesarean section.
